label.purpose: Buttons, tabs, nav rows, fields, and metadata.

shadows.name: soft-control
shadows.purpose: Low emphasis controls, selected secondary tabs, and subtle hover response.

shadows.name: dialog
shadows.purpose: Modal and floating layers above a backdrop.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Default hover, active, and icon color transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Steady product action using the existing DaisyUI primary role.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--color-primary, #515271); color: #fff; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 16px; font: 600 14px/1.4 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-in-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-in-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #474867; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-secondary, #119eff); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: .7; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Azure Action Button
components.description: High-clarity action or selected state using Capgo Azure.
components.css: .ds-btn-azure { background: var(--color-secondary, #119eff); color: #fff; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 16px; font: 600 14px/1.4 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-in-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-in-out; } .ds-btn-azure:hover { background: #008aeb; } .ds-btn-azure:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #119eff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Quiet secondary control for reload, cancel, and filter entry points.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: #fff; color: #475569; border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; font: 500 14px/1.4 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-in-out, border-color 150ms ease-in-out, color 150ms ease-in-out; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #f1f5f9; border-color: #94a3b8; color: #334155; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #119eff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Dark shell navigation row with azure active state.
components.css: .ds-sidebar-item { width: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; min-height: 44px; gap: 12px; padding: 12px; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: #94a3b8; font: 500 14px/1.4 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-in-out, color 150ms ease-in-out; } .ds-sidebar-item:hover { background: rgba(51,65,85,.5); color: #cbd5e1; } .ds-sidebar-item-active { background: #334155; color: #119eff; cursor: default; } .ds-sidebar-icon { width: 20px; height: 20px; border-radius: 5px; background: currentColor; opacity: .9; } .ds-sidebar-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #119eff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Primary Tab
components.description: Open-tab pattern used inside app routes.
components.css: .ds-tab { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 38px; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0; background: transparent; color: rgba(100,116,139,.85); font: 500 14px/1.4 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-in-out, color 150ms ease-in-out, border-color 150ms ease-in-out; } .ds-tab:hover { background: rgba(219,234,254,.7); color: #334155; } .ds-tab-active { color: #119eff; background: #eff6ff; border-color: rgba(191,219,254,.7); border-bottom-color: transparent; } .ds-tab:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #119eff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: Plain content container for empty states and local panels.
components.html:
Ready to ship

Create an app to start managing live updates.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; color: #1e293b; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0,0,0,.08), 0 4px 6px -2px rgba(0,0,0,.01); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 24px; line-height: 1.33; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -.01em; } .ds-card p { margin: 0; color: #475569; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Compact field vocabulary for search, filters, and settings forms.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; min-height: 40px; background: #fff; color: #1e293b; border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; font: 400 14px/1.4 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 150ms ease-in-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-in-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #475569; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #119eff; outline: 2px solid rgba(17,158,255,.3); outline-offset: 1px; } .ds-input:disabled { background: #f1f5f9; color: #64748b; cursor: not-allowed; }

narrative.overview:
Capgo Console is operational product software. The system should feel steady under pressure: dark slate navigation, quiet content surfaces, clear focus states, and concise controls that keep the user in the task. It is not trying to sell the product on every screen. It is helping someone ship, inspect, and recover.

The visual system is restrained by default. Azure is reserved for focus, selection, meaningful state, and the clearest action on a screen. Dusk, slate, and white carry the structure. Cards and shadows exist, but only to separate a repeated object, dialog, empty state, or table tool from its surroundings.
keyCharacteristics: Dense but readable app shell for repeated operational work.
Dark slate side navigation with azure active state.
Light content surfaces with slate text and restrained borders.
Standard product controls: DaisyUI buttons/dialogs, Tailwind utilities, tabs, tables, toggles, and form fields.
Fast state motion around 150-200ms, used for feedback and navigation only.

rules.name: The Azure Is State Rule
rules.body: Azure marks state, focus, selection, or one obvious action. If it is only decoration, remove it.

rules.name: The Slate Shell Rule
rules.body: Navigation and global chrome stay in slate. Content should not become a rainbow of product areas.

rules.name: The Product Scale Rule
rules.body: Do not use fluid hero typography in console screens. Fixed rem sizes keep dense UI predictable.

rules.name: The Prompt Restraint Rule
rules.body: Prompt can carry the brand mark. It must not appear in dense labels, tables, settings controls, or logs.

rules.name: The Flat By Default Rule
rules.body: Tables, panels, settings groups, and nav rows stay flat at rest. Add a shadow only when a layer floats above the page.

dos: Do preserve the dark slate shell and quiet content surface split.
Do use Capgo Azure for state, selection, focus, and one clear action.
Do keep console copy concise and operational.
Do use DaisyUI `d-` prefixed primitives for buttons, dialogs, fields, and interactive controls when they fit.
Do design tables, logs, and settings for dense data and repeated use.
Do include loading, empty, disabled, hover, focus, error, and restricted-access states.
donts: Don't make the console feel like an overdecorated SaaS dashboard.
Don't make authenticated product screens feel like a marketing-heavy landing page.
Don't build generic AI card grids, decorative gradients, glass effects, or ornamental animation.
Don't use large side-stripe borders, gradient text, nested cards, or 32px-plus card radii.
Don't hide operational state behind vague wizard copy.
Don't introduce a new color family when slate, dusk, azure, teal, warning, and status colors already cover the role.
